## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? Link related issues, e.g. "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 📖 Documentation / wiki
- [ ] 🧹 Chore / build / CI
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no behavior change)

## Platform(s) affected

- [ ] Windows (`4h-unfolder-win`)
- [ ] macOS (`4h-unfolder-mac-swift`)
- [ ] Shared / docs / repo-wide

## How was this tested?

<!--
Windows:  dotnet build && dotnet test tests/FourHUnfolder.Tests
macOS:    swift build && swift test   (or Xcode Test Navigator)
Describe manual testing too, and attach a sample .obj/.pdo if relevant.

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI or pattern-output changes, before/after images help a lot. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Builds clean on the affected platform(s)
- [ ] All tests pass; new behavior has test coverage
- [ ] No new warnings beyond the existing baseline
- [ ] Docs / [wiki](https://github.com/nghiazer/4H-Unfolder/wiki) updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] App version **not** bumped (unless coordinated with the maintainer)
- [ ] I have read the [Contributing guide](CONTRIBUTING.md) and agree to the [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
